entities.name: strategy-compounder
entities.context: CLI tool for aggregating insights across sessions, tracking theme evolution, identifying contradictions, and measuring strategic shifts

entities.name: Cross-session synthesis
entities.context: Process of aggregating insights from multiple sessions and tracking evolution over time

entities.name: Monthly Strategy Review
entities.context: End-of-month analysis using strategy-compounder for board updates, team alignment, and priority setting

entities.name: Pre-Decision Analysis
entities.context: Focused analysis on single theme before major decisions to validate and identify conflicts

entities.name: Weekly Health Check
entities.context: Every Monday morning quick analysis using strategy-compounder

entities.name: GTM hypotheses
entities.context: Go-to-market hypotheses stored as baseline for strategy comparison

entities.name: Heat zones
entities.context: Mapped output from strategy analysis showing areas of focus or concern

entities.name: Theme evolution
entities.context: Tracking how strategic themes change and develop over time

entities.name: Cohesion assessment
entities.context: Evaluation of alignment and consistency across strategic elements

relationships.context: Tool performs cross-session synthesis as core capability
Monthly review runs strategy-compounder with month period and baseline
Pre-decision analysis uses strategy-compounder with theme filter
Monday morning health check runs strategy-compounder with quick flag
GTM hypotheses used as baseline for strategy comparison
Tool maps and outputs heat zones in analysis
Synthesis process tracks theme evolution across sessions
Tool produces cohesion assessment as part of output
